overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V depicting a character walking through a rain-soaked downtown cityscape at night. The character navigates wet sidewalks and crosswalks past illuminated skyscrapers including the JW Marriott and various commercial buildings, with reflective streets mirroring the urban neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown commercial sidewalk with bank building

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green, signaling permission to cross

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk past the East West Bank building, approaching the intersection

entered.detail: modern building with illuminated EAST WEST BANK signage on the facade
yellow diamond-shaped pedestrian crossing warning sign on a pole
traffic signal showing red then changing to green

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a wet downtown sidewalk at night, with the East West Bank building prominent on the right. The camera moves forward past a pedestrian crossing sign on the left, approaching an intersection where the traffic light changes from red to green.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide intersection crosswalk with illuminated skyscraper views

events.description: steps from concrete sidewalk onto the striped crosswalk to cross the wide street
continues walking across the wet reflective street toward the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide wet street at the crosswalk, heading toward the JW Marriott building visible on the left

notable_agents.action: car waiting at the red light in the distance across the intersection

entered.detail: tall illuminated skyscraper with vertical JW MARRIOTT signage and blue accent lighting
wet reflective zebra-striped crosswalk with puddles mirroring city lights

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from sidewalk to street, crossing the wide wet intersection. The JW Marriott skyscraper dominates the left skyline with its blue illumination, while the reflective crosswalk mirrors the surrounding city lights. The camera moves steadily across the open space of the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined commercial sidewalk with office buildings

events.description: steps onto the opposite sidewalk from the crosswalk, returning to pedestrian walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past the FlexOffice building and mature street trees lining the path

notable_agents.action: black car driving past on the wet street alongside the sidewalk

entered.detail: dark modern office building with illuminated FlexOffice signage on the ground floor
mature trees with dense canopies lining the sidewalk between pedestrians and the street
blue USPS postal mailbox on the sidewalk near the curb

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the character walks along a tree-lined sidewalk shaded by mature trees. The FlexOffice building is prominent on the left, while a blue mailbox stands near the curb. Vehicles pass by on the wet street to the right, and the JW Marriott fades into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching major intersection with large digital billboards and bank building

events.description: pedestrian density increases near the intersection with several people visible ahead
pausing at the corner to wait for vehicles to pass before crossing the street

agents.ego_description: pausing at the street corner observing traffic and waiting for a gap to cross safely

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking across the street ahead of the camera
red SUV driving through the intersection

entered.detail: large illuminated digital billboard displaying YOU CAN'T STOP SPORT text on building facade
modern building with prominent blue usbank signage illuminated at night

segments.scene_description: Approaching a major intersection, the scene opens up with large digital billboards including the YOU CAN'T STOP SPORT display. The usbank building becomes visible ahead across the street. Pedestrian activity increases, and the character pauses at the corner waiting for traffic including a red SUV to clear before crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: crossing major intersection with bank building on the corner

events.description: steps onto the crosswalk to begin crossing the final wide intersection
vehicles pass by on the right side while continuing to cross the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection toward the usbank building on the opposite corner

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving past the crosswalk on the right

entered.detail: zebra-striped crosswalk markings across the wide avenue with wet reflective surface

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character crossing the wide intersection toward the usbank building, which grows larger as the camera approaches. Vehicles pass by on the right as the character traverses the wet reflective crosswalk, with the city lights creating mirror-like reflections on the rain-soaked pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked downtown district, transitioning from a narrow sidewalk into a series of wide, neon-lit intersections. It begins on a wet pavement beside the East West Bank building, moving past a pedestrian sign toward an intersection as the traffic light shifts to green. As the character steps into the street, the scene opens up to reveal the blue illumination of the JW Marriott skyscraper reflecting off the mirrored surface of the crosswalk. The camera then follows the character along a tree-lined sidewalk past the FlexOffice building and a blue mailbox before the environment expands again at a major junction dominated by large digital billboards. Finally, the view pushes forward across another reflective intersection, with the usbank building growing larger in the frame as vehicles pass by on the rain-slicked road.
